title: bellis perennis proles pumila
intro: Bellis perennis proles pumila, also known as the dwarf dandelion or small dandelion, is a small, compact variety of the common dandelion plant. This plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, diuretic, and laxative effects. The health benefits of bellis perennis proles pumila include reducing blood pressure, improving digestion, and supporting liver function. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, including digestive problems and skin conditions.
